motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
from typing import List
import heapq

class Solution:
    def findAllPeople(self, n: int, meetings: List[List[int]], firstPerson: int) -> List[int]:
        graph = [[] for _ in range(n)]
        for x, y, time in meetings:
            graph[x].append((time, y))
            graph[y].append((time, x))
        
        pq = [(0, firstPerson)]
        visited = set([firstPerson])
        
        while pq:
            time, person = heapq.heappop(pq)
            for t, neighbor in graph[person]:
                if t > time and neighbor not in visited:
                    visited.add(neighbor)
                    heapq.heappush(pq, (t, neighbor))
        
        return list(visited)
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(m log m)
space complexity: O(n + m)
energy implications: LOW
